tagline: The US's leading estate liquidation franchise built on a home-based model and driven by a growing Baby Boomer downsizing wave
description_short: Blue Moon Estate Sales is the leading home-based estate liquidation franchise with 136 US territories earning commission income from estate sale events. Franchisees manage end-to-end liquidations for downsizing Baby Boomers and families in transition and keep 40% of proceeds with average territory gross sales of $320636. The $89K standard entry point home-based model and fragmented independent competition make this a compelling low-overhead ownership opportunity for second-career buyers.
market_intelligence_insight: US estate liquidation services valued at $230M in 2024 with rising demand as 10000 Baby Boomers turn 65 daily; broader liquidation sector projected at 9.4% CAGR through 2034 driven by aging population downsizing and estate transitions
item_19_headline: Average territory gross sales in 2025 were $320636 with top performer reaching $1398173 across 73 included territories
ongoing_support: dedicated business coach,virtual training updates,pricing assistance,operational support,website maintenance,SEO management,annual conference,regional meetings,newsletter and blog
